text.tspan: (web, mobile, partner) u2014 see ONE unified GraphQL schema
(Apollo Router, Cosmo Router, Mesh, GraphQL Hive)
KEY INSIGHT: each team owns its piece of the Customer type.
u2022 Customers team owns name, email
No team needs to coordinate with others to add fields to Customer.
The gateway figures out the cross-subgraph plan.
2. consult SUPERGRAPH u2014 know which fields live where
3. plan a query plan (which subgraph to hit, in what order, for which fields)
4. dispatch SUB-QUERIES to subgraphs IN PARALLEL
5. stitch responses; resolve entity references across subgraphs

g.text: query { customer(id:42) { name orders { total } loyaltyTier } }
